news.title:
Go Digit Insurance presented growth strategy, capital allocation, and risk management during analyst meet.
Key highlights: segmented pricing, scaled direct channels, new products, and tech-driven distribution insights.
news.summary:
Go Digit Insurance presented growth strategy, capital allocation, and risk management during analyst meet.
Key highlights: segmented pricing, scaled direct channels, new products, and tech-driven distribution insights.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance Ltd shared an investor presentation under Regulation 30 (LODR) ahead of its analysts' meet on 16th Feb 2026, detailing its strategic focus areas.
The company emphasizes data-driven risk segmentation, ROE-focused growth, and leveraging technology to scale operations, particularly in motor OD claims and commercial lines.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance Ltd shared an investor presentation under Regulation 30 (LODR) ahead of its analysts' meet on 16th Feb 2026, detailing its strategic focus areas.
The company emphasizes data-driven risk segmentation, ROE-focused growth, and leveraging technology to scale operations, particularly in motor OD claims and commercial lines.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance announces Analyst/Investor meet on 16th Feb 2026 in Bengaluru.
Meeting details shared comply with SEBI regulations; no price-sensitive info will be disclosed.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance announces Analyst/Investor meet on 16th Feb 2026 in Bengaluru.
Meeting details shared comply with SEBI regulations; no price-sensitive info will be disclosed.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance reported 20.9% GDPI growth for Q3 FY26.
Two-wheeler segment grew 47%, contributing Rs. 668 crore; solvency at 230%.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance reported 20.9% GDPI growth for Q3 FY26.
Two-wheeler segment grew 47%, contributing Rs. 668 crore; solvency at 230%.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance monitors markets, setting predefined equity buying levels.
This reflects a disciplined investment approach, per management's concall update.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance monitors markets, setting predefined equity buying levels.
This reflects a disciplined investment approach, per management's concall update.

news.title:
Go Digit expects reduced annual volatility in net earned premium.
Management foresees smoother trends despite quarterly fluctuations.
news.summary:
Go Digit expects reduced annual volatility in net earned premium.
Management foresees smoother trends despite quarterly fluctuations.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance reported 37% PBT growth in Q3 FY26.
The company saw a 21% rise in premiums, focusing on motor segment and investments.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance reported 37% PBT growth in Q3 FY26.
The company saw a 21% rise in premiums, focusing on motor segment and investments.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance Ltd hosted its Q3 FY25-26 earnings call on 22nd Jan 2026.
The call's audio recording is available on the company's website for stakeholders.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance Ltd hosted its Q3 FY25-26 earnings call on 22nd Jan 2026.
The call's audio recording is available on the company's website for stakeholders.

news.title:
Go Digit Q3 FY26 net profit at ₹135.6 crores, up 51.6% YoY, down 2% QoQ.
Net sales rose 12% sequentially to ₹2,088.2 crores; stock at ₹324.2, up 1.2%.
news.summary:
Go Digit Q3 FY26 net profit at ₹135.6 crores, up 51.6% YoY, down 2% QoQ.
Net sales rose 12% sequentially to ₹2,088.2 crores; stock at ₹324.2, up 1.2%.

news.title:
Go Digit's gross premium rose 8.7% YoY to ₹2909.2 Cr in Q3.
Net underwriting loss improved to ₹226.0 Cr; solvency ratio steady at 2.3.
news.summary:
Go Digit's gross premium rose 8.7% YoY to ₹2909.2 Cr in Q3.
Net underwriting loss improved to ₹226.0 Cr; solvency ratio steady at 2.3.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance to hold Board Meeting on Jan 22, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed for insiders and designated persons until Jan 27, 2026, as per insider trading code.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance to hold Board Meeting on Jan 22, 2026, to approve Q3 FY26 unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed for insiders and designated persons until Jan 27, 2026, as per insider trading code.

news.title: Go Digit reports a 22% YoY increase in premiums, reflecting strong growth.
news.summary: Go Digit reports a 22% YoY increase in premiums, reflecting strong growth.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance's CRISIL rating changed from 'AA Stable' to 'AA Rating Watch with Developing Implications'.
The change follows board approval for amalgamation with Go Digit Infoworks Services Pvt Ltd.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance's CRISIL rating changed from 'AA Stable' to 'AA Rating Watch with Developing Implications'.
The change follows board approval for amalgamation with Go Digit Infoworks Services Pvt Ltd.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance announces amalgamation with its holding company.
Promoter shareholding rises by 0.03%; shares worth INR 43 cr issued at premium.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance announces amalgamation with its holding company.
Promoter shareholding rises by 0.03%; shares worth INR 43 cr issued at premium.

news.title:
Go Digit General Insurance's board approves merger with Go Digit Infoworks, pending regulatory and shareholder nods.
Post-merger, promoter shareholding to rise marginally by 0.03%; aims for scalable growth and regulatory alignment.
news.summary:
Go Digit General Insurance's board approves merger with Go Digit Infoworks, pending regulatory and shareholder nods.

Reports strong PBT growth, better underwriting, and rising market share.
news.summary:
Citi assigns Buy rating to GoDigit, sets target price of 420.

news.title:
Go Digit reports 12.6% premium growth, 15.4% AUM rise, and better combined ratio.
Focus on AI-driven underwriting, retail health, motor portfolio, and solvency for strong ROE.
news.summary:
